_domain_hint: Iran / Israel / Houthi / IRGC theatre. Sources: Reuters, AP, Al Jazeera, BBC, IDF spokesperson, IRGC statements, Iranian state media (IRNA/Tasnim/Mehr/Press TV), UKMTO maritime bulletins, ISW Iran updates.
claim: US military forces physically entered Iranian terrestrial territory by March 31, 2026 (11:59 PM ET).
claim_origin: Polymarket 'US forces enter Iran by March 31' market hypothesis

sources.text: Polymarket market 'US forces enter Iran by March 31' resolved NO with $73,927,762 trading volume. As of March 31 2026 23:59 ET, no credible reports existed of US military personnel having physically entered Iranian terrestrial territory.

All earlier deadline markets in the same ladder (February 28, March 1, March 3, March 7, March 14) resolved NO. Combat operations during this period were conducted via airstrikes only; no ground entry occurred.

We have rescued the seriously wounded, and really brave, F-15 Crew Member/Officer, from deep inside the mountains of Iran. [Posted April 5, 2026 — five days after the March 31 deadline. The first US ground entry occurred between April 1-5, 2026.]

gold.rationale_summary: The actual US ground entry (F-15 pilot rescue raids) occurred on or around April 5, 2026, approximately 5 days after the March 31 deadline. The Polymarket March 31 market resolved NO with $74M volume. The claim is false on hard deadline grounds — temporal precision matters. Subsequently the April 30 market resolved YES, but specifically because the event occurred between April 1-5.
required_caveats: US ground entry did occur subsequently (April 5, 2026 rescue raids), but after the March 31 deadline.
Combat operations prior to March 31 were exclusively airstrikes, no ground entry.
